title: Create and Tinker 2
description: This is a modpack centered around Create. Other big mods are Better Nether and End, Supplementaries and Origins. There are also mods for Worldgen as well as Create addons. Sodium is also included with a bunch more of optimization mods.
body:
**Welcome to Create and Tinker 2!**

This is a modpack centered around Create. Beside this the modpack is focused on some tweaks to make the game more interesting are better performance. To achieve this mods such as Sodium or Better Nether are included. While for now this is only a bunch of mods, I might add some craft tweaker skripts in the future.

The modpack includes a lot of create add-ons to increase focus on create and give you more ways to interact with create content.

There are also performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Indium et cetera to make the game run smoother.

To enhance the general gameplay Terralith, Better Nether, Better End, Supplemetaries and all the Yung mods are in the pack. I have also included the Origins mod to give you more options for your playstyle or the possibility for more challenges as some of the harder origins are really good at making it ... bad.

The last big thing is Worldhost, which allows you to more easily play with friends.

Have fun!

Yours sincerely, TheStormcrafter
